testcase.classname: PasswordRotationService checkRotationStatus should return canRotate false when user not found
testcase.name: PasswordRotationService checkRotationStatus should return canRotate false when user not found

testcase.classname: PasswordRotationService checkRotationStatus should return canRotate false when user has no password
testcase.name: PasswordRotationService checkRotationStatus should return canRotate false when user has no password

testcase.classname: PasswordRotationService checkRotationStatus should return expired status when password has expired
testcase.name: PasswordRotationService checkRotationStatus should return expired status when password has expired

testcase.classname: PasswordRotationService checkRotationStatus should return valid status with days until expiry
testcase.name: PasswordRotationService checkRotationStatus should return valid status with days until expiry

testcase.classname: PasswordRotationService checkRotationStatus should use password history date when available
testcase.name: PasswordRotationService checkRotationStatus should use password history date when available

testcase.classname: PasswordRotationService validatePasswordNotInHistory should return valid true when history is empty
testcase.name: PasswordRotationService validatePasswordNotInHistory should return valid true when history is empty

testcase.classname: PasswordRotationService validatePasswordNotInHistory should return valid true when password not in history
testcase.name: PasswordRotationService validatePasswordNotInHistory should return valid true when password not in history

testcase.classname: PasswordRotationService validatePasswordNotInHistory should return valid false when password matches history
testcase.name: PasswordRotationService validatePasswordNotInHistory should return valid false when password matches history

testcase.classname: PasswordRotationService validatePasswordNotInHistory should respect custom password history count
testcase.name: PasswordRotationService validatePasswordNotInHistory should respect custom password history count

testcase.classname: PasswordRotationService addPasswordToHistory should add password to history and not delete when under limit
testcase.name: PasswordRotationService addPasswordToHistory should add password to history and not delete when under limit

testcase.classname: PasswordRotationService addPasswordToHistory should delete old entries when over limit
testcase.name: PasswordRotationService addPasswordToHistory should delete old entries when over limit

testcase.classname: PasswordRotationService validatePasswordRotation should return invalid when rotation status cannot rotate
testcase.name: PasswordRotationService validatePasswordRotation should return invalid when rotation status cannot rotate

testcase.classname: PasswordRotationService validatePasswordRotation should return invalid when password is in history
testcase.name: PasswordRotationService validatePasswordRotation should return invalid when password is in history

testcase.classname: PasswordRotationService validatePasswordRotation should return valid when all checks pass
testcase.name: PasswordRotationService validatePasswordRotation should return valid when all checks pass

testcase.classname: PasswordRotationService getPasswordHistory should return password history with default limit
testcase.name: PasswordRotationService getPasswordHistory should return password history with default limit

testcase.classname: PasswordRotationService getPasswordHistory should return password history with custom limit
testcase.name: PasswordRotationService getPasswordHistory should return password history with custom limit

testcase.classname: PasswordRotationService getPasswordHistory should select only required fields
testcase.name: PasswordRotationService getPasswordHistory should select only required fields

testcase.classname: PasswordRotationService clearPasswordHistory should delete all password history for user
testcase.name: PasswordRotationService clearPasswordHistory should delete all password history for user

testcase.classname: PasswordRotationService getUsersWithExpiredPasswords should return empty array when no users have expired passwords
testcase.name: PasswordRotationService getUsersWithExpiredPasswords should return empty array when no users have expired passwords

testcase.classname: PasswordRotationService getUsersWithExpiredPasswords should return users with expired passwords
testcase.name: PasswordRotationService getUsersWithExpiredPasswords should return users with expired passwords

testcase.classname: PasswordRotationService getUsersWithExpiredPasswords should use password history date for expiry calculation
testcase.name: PasswordRotationService getUsersWithExpiredPasswords should use password history date for expiry calculation

testcase.classname: PasswordRotationService getUsersWithExpiredPasswords should only include users with passwords
testcase.name: PasswordRotationService getUsersWithExpiredPasswords should only include users with passwords

testcase.classname: PasswordRotationService requiresPasswordRotation should return false when user not found
testcase.name: PasswordRotationService requiresPasswordRotation should return false when user not found

testcase.classname: PasswordRotationService requiresPasswordRotation should return false when user has no password
testcase.name: PasswordRotationService requiresPasswordRotation should return false when user has no password

testcase.classname: PasswordRotationService requiresPasswordRotation should return true when password is expired
testcase.name: PasswordRotationService requiresPasswordRotation should return true when password is expired

testcase.classname: PasswordRotationService requiresPasswordRotation should return true when within warning period
testcase.name: PasswordRotationService requiresPasswordRotation should return true when within warning period

testcase.classname: PasswordRotationService requiresPasswordRotation should return false when not in warning period and not expired
testcase.name: PasswordRotationService requiresPasswordRotation should return false when not in warning period and not expired

testcase.classname: PasswordRotationService requiresPasswordRotation should use custom warning days from config
testcase.name: PasswordRotationService requiresPasswordRotation should use custom warning days from config

testcase.classname: HeaderValidationMiddleware should be defined
testcase.name: HeaderValidationMiddleware should be defined

testcase.classname: HeaderValidationMiddleware use should pass valid headers
testcase.name: HeaderValidationMiddleware use should pass valid headers

testcase.classname: HeaderValidationMiddleware use should throw BadRequestException for blocked headers
testcase.name: HeaderValidationMiddleware use should throw BadRequestException for blocked headers

testcase.classname: HeaderValidationMiddleware use should throw BadRequestException for XSS patterns
testcase.name: HeaderValidationMiddleware use should throw BadRequestException for XSS patterns

testcase.classname: HeaderValidationMiddleware use should throw BadRequestException for SQL injection patterns
testcase.name: HeaderValidationMiddleware use should throw BadRequestException for SQL injection patterns

testcase.classname: HeaderValidationMiddleware use should throw BadRequestException for null bytes
testcase.name: HeaderValidationMiddleware use should throw BadRequestException for null bytes

testcase.classname: HeaderValidationMiddleware use should pass headers with authorization
testcase.name: HeaderValidationMiddleware use should pass headers with authorization

testcase.classname: HeaderValidationMiddleware use should pass headers with API key
testcase.name: HeaderValidationMiddleware use should pass headers with API key

testcase.classname: HeaderValidationMiddleware validateHeaders should return valid for empty headers
testcase.name: HeaderValidationMiddleware validateHeaders should return valid for empty headers

testcase.classname: HeaderValidationMiddleware validateHeaders should return invalid for oversized header
testcase.name: HeaderValidationMiddleware validateHeaders should return invalid for oversized header

testcase.classname: HeaderValidationMiddleware validateHeaders should return invalid for too many headers
testcase.name: HeaderValidationMiddleware validateHeaders should return invalid for too many headers

testcase.classname: HeaderValidationMiddleware validateHeaders should return warning for control characters
testcase.name: HeaderValidationMiddleware validateHeaders should return warning for control characters

testcase.classname: HeaderValidationMiddleware validateHeaders should return warning for missing Content-Type on POST
testcase.name: HeaderValidationMiddleware validateHeaders should return warning for missing Content-Type on POST

testcase.classname: HeaderValidationMiddleware validateHeaders should return invalid for invalid Content-Type
testcase.name: HeaderValidationMiddleware validateHeaders should return invalid for invalid Content-Type

testcase.classname: HeaderValidationMiddleware validateHeaders should sanitize headers
testcase.name: HeaderValidationMiddleware validateHeaders should sanitize headers

testcase.classname: HeaderValidationMiddleware validateHeader should return valid for normal header
testcase.name: HeaderValidationMiddleware validateHeader should return valid for normal header

testcase.classname: HeaderValidationMiddleware validateHeader should return invalid for blocked header
testcase.name: HeaderValidationMiddleware validateHeader should return invalid for blocked header

testcase.classname: HeaderValidationMiddleware validateHeader should return invalid for oversized header
testcase.name: HeaderValidationMiddleware validateHeader should return invalid for oversized header

testcase.classname: HeaderValidationMiddleware validateHeader should return invalid for path traversal
testcase.name: HeaderValidationMiddleware validateHeader should return invalid for path traversal

testcase.classname: HeaderValidationMiddleware getSecurityReport should return high score for complete security headers
testcase.name: HeaderValidationMiddleware getSecurityReport should return high score for complete security headers

testcase.classname: HeaderValidationMiddleware getSecurityReport should return low score for missing security headers
testcase.name: HeaderValidationMiddleware getSecurityReport should return low score for missing security headers

testcase.classname: HeaderValidationMiddleware getSecurityReport should detect information disclosure
testcase.name: HeaderValidationMiddleware getSecurityReport should detect information disclosure

testcase.classname: HeaderValidationMiddleware getSecurityReport should recommend HSTS improvements
testcase.name: HeaderValidationMiddleware getSecurityReport should recommend HSTS improvements

testcase.classname: HeaderValidationMiddleware detectSuspiciousPatterns should detect XSS patterns
testcase.name: HeaderValidationMiddleware detectSuspiciousPatterns should detect XSS patterns

testcase.classname: HeaderValidationMiddleware detectSuspiciousPatterns should detect javascript: protocol
testcase.name: HeaderValidationMiddleware detectSuspiciousPatterns should detect javascript: protocol

testcase.classname: HeaderValidationMiddleware detectSuspiciousPatterns should detect SQL injection patterns
testcase.name: HeaderValidationMiddleware detectSuspiciousPatterns should detect SQL injection patterns

testcase.classname: HeaderValidationMiddleware detectSuspiciousPatterns should skip validation for authorization header
testcase.name: HeaderValidationMiddleware detectSuspiciousPatterns should skip validation for authorization header

testcase.classname: HeaderValidationMiddleware detectSuspiciousPatterns should skip validation for cookie header
testcase.name: HeaderValidationMiddleware detectSuspiciousPatterns should skip validation for cookie header

testcase.classname: HeaderValidationMiddleware isValidContentType should return true for application/json
testcase.name: HeaderValidationMiddleware isValidContentType should return true for application/json

testcase.classname: HeaderValidationMiddleware isValidContentType should return true for multipart/form-data
testcase.name: HeaderValidationMiddleware isValidContentType should return true for multipart/form-data

testcase.classname: HeaderValidationMiddleware isValidContentType should return false for invalid content type
testcase.name: HeaderValidationMiddleware isValidContentType should return false for invalid content type

testcase.classname: IpBlockingService should be defined
testcase.name: IpBlockingService should be defined

testcase.classname: IpBlockingService isIpBlocked should return false when IP is not blocked
testcase.name: IpBlockingService isIpBlocked should return false when IP is not blocked

testcase.classname: IpBlockingService isIpBlocked should return true when IP is blocked
testcase.name: IpBlockingService isIpBlocked should return true when IP is blocked

testcase.classname: IpBlockingService isIpBlocked should unblock IP when block has expired
testcase.name: IpBlockingService isIpBlocked should unblock IP when block has expired

testcase.classname: IpBlockingService isIpWhitelisted should return true when IP is whitelisted
testcase.name: IpBlockingService isIpWhitelisted should return true when IP is whitelisted

testcase.classname: IpBlockingService isIpWhitelisted should return false when IP is not whitelisted
testcase.name: IpBlockingService isIpWhitelisted should return false when IP is not whitelisted

testcase.classname: IpBlockingService blockIp should block IP with duration
testcase.name: IpBlockingService blockIp should block IP with duration

testcase.classname: IpBlockingService blockIp should not block whitelisted IP
testcase.name: IpBlockingService blockIp should not block whitelisted IP

testcase.classname: IpBlockingService addToWhitelist should add IP to whitelist
testcase.name: IpBlockingService addToWhitelist should add IP to whitelist

testcase.classname: IpBlockingService addToWhitelist should not duplicate IPs in whitelist
testcase.name: IpBlockingService addToWhitelist should not duplicate IPs in whitelist

testcase.classname: IpBlockingService recordFailedAttempt should record failed attempt and auto-block when threshold exceeded
testcase.name: IpBlockingService recordFailedAttempt should record failed attempt and auto-block when threshold exceeded

testcase.classname: SecurityMiddleware getClientIp should extract IP from x-forwarded-for header
testcase.name: SecurityMiddleware getClientIp should extract IP from x-forwarded-for header

testcase.classname: SecurityMiddleware getClientIp should extract IP from x-real-ip header
testcase.name: SecurityMiddleware getClientIp should extract IP from x-real-ip header

testcase.classname: SecurityMiddleware getClientIp should use connection.remoteAddress when headers are not present
testcase.name: SecurityMiddleware getClientIp should use connection.remoteAddress when headers are not present

testcase.classname: SecurityMiddleware getClientIp should use socket.remoteAddress as fallback
testcase.name: SecurityMiddleware getClientIp should use socket.remoteAddress as fallback

testcase.classname: SecurityMiddleware getClientIp should return unknown when no IP can be determined
testcase.name: SecurityMiddleware getClientIp should return unknown when no IP can be determined

testcase.classname: SecurityHeadersService returns the XSS-focused security header set
testcase.name: SecurityHeadersService returns the XSS-focused security header set

testcase.classname: SecurityHeadersService returns the relaxed development profile when requested
testcase.name: SecurityHeadersService returns the relaxed development profile when requested

testcase.classname: EmailQueueService applies timeout defaults when adding jobs
testcase.name: EmailQueueService applies timeout defaults when adding jobs

testcase.classname: EmailQueueService fails jobs that exceed the configured timeout
testcase.name: EmailQueueService fails jobs that exceed the configured timeout

testcase.classname: EmailQueueService removes listeners and clears monitors during shutdown
testcase.name: EmailQueueService removes listeners and clears monitors during shutdown

testcase.classname: Custom Exceptions should be tested via src/common/errors
testcase.name: Custom Exceptions should be tested via src/common/errors

testcase.classname: Error Filter should be tested via src/common/errors/error.filter.spec.ts
testcase.name: Error Filter should be tested via src/common/errors/error.filter.spec.ts
